name: Feature Request

labels: enhancement

---

## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this feature solve? Why do you need it?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you would like.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered.

## Which component is affected?

- [ ] Frontend (Angular UI)
- [ ] Backend (NestJS API)
- [ ] Agent Pipeline
- [ ] Specific Agent: ___________
- [ ] LLM Integration
- [ ] MCP Servers
- [ ] GitLab Integration
- [ ] Settings / Configuration
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Docker / Deployment
- [ ] Other: ___________

## Additional Context

Screenshots, mockups, or examples from other tools.
